rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core logic: both study how two stakeholder/marketing-related signals jointly affect firm valuation outcomes and both identify firm business scope as a key boundary condition (stronger effects in narrow-scope firms). Given this close conceptual overlap in the notes (joint signal interpretation and scope moderation), this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention, despite only one DOI-level match record.
